arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'is dating former Love Island contestant Grace Rosa Jackson' who previously coupled up with Joey Essex both in the villa and in real life
arts.sum: Jackson, 25, featured on season 11 of the ITV2 dating show and she very briefly coupled up with Joey Essex. This came after she and Essex had enjoyed a holiday romance in 2023.

arts.ttl: Matty Cash names Aston Villa's 'difference maker' who flies under the radar
arts.sum: Matty Cash has described Boubacar Kamara as a "difference maker" and admits Aston Villa miss him when he's out of the team. Asked how much he has been missed, Cash said: "A lot.

arts.sum: Maurizio Sarri admits ‘it was a mistake’ to push for the Chelsea exit and come...

arts.ttl: Euro giants join Chelsea in Liam Delap chase as Ipswich boss addresses transfer clause
arts.sum: Interest in Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap is now beginning to intensify following his fine start to the Premier League season with the ex-Manchester City starlet being tracked by the likes of Chelsea and Manchester United, respectively

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Liverpool and Arsenal Want to Sign ‘Very Exciting’ £30m Star
arts.sum: Lyon may be forced to part ways with their talented winger, due to their dire financial situation.

arts.ttl: Chelsea face Man Utd battle for Serie A sensation
arts.sum: Due to Dorgu's past at left-back, Fasano claims that Ruben Amorim has identified the youngster as an ideal option for his left wing-back role. His versatility and reliability have made him an attractive commodity in the market and the likes of Chelsea - the club he grew up supporting - and Tottenham were interested in a summer move only to be put off by Lecce's whopping €35 million price tag.

arts.ttl: Chelsea loanee in line for season debut against Man Utd
arts.sum: Chelsea loanee Armando Broja could make the first appearance of his Everton spell against Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted XI vs Aston Villa as Enzo Maresca makes three changes from weekend with £46m star benched
arts.sum: Chelsea will be hoping to keep their momentum going this weekend when they host Premier League rivals Aston Villa at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea play at...

arts.ttl: Chelsea legend Frank Lampard's dramatic Coventry City manager debut ends with last-minute penalty
arts.sum: The visitors' failure to effectively deal with a Coventry free-kick resulted in a promising opportunity for the home side, as Mason-Clark headed the ball towards Norman Bassette, whose header was safely gathered by goalkeeper Jak Alnwick. The Sky Blues found themselves behind twice, and it seemed Alex Robertson's exceptional strike early in the second half would secure the Bluebirds their first away win since April.

arts.ttl: 'I think': David Seaman has made his prediction for Chelsea vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Chelsea kickstart a hectic December tomorrow afternoon by hosting Aston Villa in the Premier League. Chelsea will play nine games across all competitions in December,...
